title: Hard Bristle Crevice Cleaning Brush UK, 2Pcs Bathroom Tile Groove Gap Cleaning Brush, Grout Cleaner Brush, Cleaning Tool for Window, Kitchen, Sink, Tub, Shower, Toilet (2, Black)
features: Material: The crevice cleaning brush uk is made of sturdy plastic, hard bristles. Cleaning Brushes For Small Spaces. TQRR crevice cleaning brushes can effortlessly reach into narrow spaces and corners with its only 0.5 cm bristle thickness

Ergonomic Design: The hard bristle crevice cleaning brush has an ergonomic handle, easy to grip, comfortable and labor-saving. The front end of the crevice cleaning brush is beveled at 15°, which can clean the crevices
Easy to Clean and Storage: The handle of long thin cleaning brushes has a small hole for easy hanging to dry and storage to save space

Deep cleaning: TQRR hard bristle crevice cleaning brush is household cleaning essentials. Thin cleaning brush easily and deeply cleans hidden dirt in narrow spaces, crevices, corners, and difficult places to reach of bathroom, toilet, home and kitchen

Wide Application: TQRR cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning window groove or tackling the shower grout various gaps. Cleaning Tools for window tracks, kitchen, Home, Bathtub, Bathroom, Dish, Window, Vehicle, Faucets, Toilet, Grout, Floor
